channel.title: Trendlyne Latest Market News
channel.description: Latest stock market insights and analyst calls from Trendlyne.

item.title: Five stocks to buy from analysts this week - April 28, 2026
item.description:
1. ICICI Bank: Deven Choksey upgrades this bank to a ‘Buy’ call, with a target price of Rs 1,691 per share, an upside of 30.9%. This upgrade followed a strong Q4FY26. Provisions hit a 12-quarter low ...

Premium: No

item.title: Market closes lower amid rising oil prices and foreign fund outflows
item.description:
Nifty 50 closed at 23,995.70 (-97, -0.4%), BSE Sensex closed at 76,886.91 (-416.7, -0.5%) while the broader Nifty 500 closed at 22,765.60 (-55.8, -0.2%). Market breadth is in the red. Of the 2,746 sto...

Premium: No

item.title: IPOs continue their march with three new issues and two listings this week
item.description:
The Nifty 50 closed higher on April 27, recovering from declines over the last three trading days. Gains were led by Sun Pharma, which rallied after announcing its plan to acquire US-based Organon for...

Premium: No

item.title: Five Interesting Stocks Today - April 24, 2026
item.description:
1. Adani Power: The stock of this power & electric utilities company surged 10.2% over the past week, driven by a strong demand outlook for domestic energy. On April 21, its subsidiary, Adani Atomic E...

Premium: No

item.title: As Trump slips on banana peels, what are domestic institutional investors betting on?
item.description:
The market is in the middle of a tug of war. While foreign investors have turned bearish, domestic institutional investors (DIIs) are loading up their portfolios. In April alone, foreign investors too...

Premium: No

item.title: India’s trade deficit jumped in FY26 with high gold prices and rising imports
item.description:
India’s trade deficit widened sharply in FY26. India’s total imports grew faster than exports over the financial year, pushing the trade deficit up by 26% to $119.3 billion. But unlike previous years,...

Premium: No

item.title: Five stocks to buy from analysts this week - April 23, 2026
item.description:
1. HDFC Bank: ICICI Direct reiterates its ‘Buy’ rating on this private bank, with a target price of Rs 1,050, a 32.7% upside. The bank's stock dropped 21.5% in the last six months and reported mixed ...

Premium: No

item.title: IPOs see momentum despite global volatility; five companies coming up
item.description:
The Nifty 50 closed flat on April 20 after gaining 1.3% last week on hopes of easing US-Iran tensions and a ceasefire. But the hotheads seem to be winning, with the US Navy’s seizure of an Iranian-fla...

Premium: No

item.title: Five Interesting Stocks Today - April 17, 2026
item.description:
1. Multi Commodity Exchange of India (MCX): The stock of this capital markets company scaled a fresh 52-week high of Rs 2,903 on April 16, powered by a broad surge across commodity markets. Between th...

item.title: Standing up to global shocks: Stocks leading revenue & earnings growth estimates
item.description:
The Indian markets are reeling from record FII outflows of Rs 1.6 lakh crore in FY26. Domestic investors have stepped in with strong inflows, cushioning the impact and keeping the indices from slippin...

Premium: No
